notes: TENTATIVE mapping — SKU order within each photo must be verified against physical swatch position.
Fan photos: position 1 = leftmost (vertical fan) or topmost (horizontal fan).
HERMES/SULTAN: paired layouts — DESENLİ+DÜZ or KOYU+AÇIK alternate within each photo.
MONICA: 1 swatch per photo, background page visible but ignored during extraction.
SÜET: verify swatch boundaries carefully — dense fan may have partial overlaps between photos.

DARK BLACKOUT.notes: Photo 1: horizontal fan (top→bottom). Photos 2-7: vertical fan (left→right). 4 swatches/photo.

HERMES BLACKOUT.notes: Each color has DESENLİ+DÜZ pair shown as adjacent strips. Photos 1-8: 3 color pairs (6 strips). Photo 9: 2 color pairs (4 strips).
